message:
fix(eprocess): guard against NaN propagation in e-value accumulator

Add NaN/Inf guard in EProcess::observe(): if the product of current
e-value and update factor is non-finite (from corrupt config or
extreme values), clamp to max_evalue rather than silently propagating
NaN which would disable rejection detection for all subsequent
observations.

Also includes beads issue tracker updates from concurrent agent work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
